subject: Ignis Scientia — a young man in a dark jacket with styled hair and glasses, from Final Fantasy XV, rendered in a CGI-photographic style
description: A young male figure stands in a straight, slightly angled posture wearing a dark fitted jacket over what appears to be a dark undershirt. He has a distinctive styled undercut hairstyle with the top swept back and upward, and wears framed rectangular glasses. His expression is composed and calm. Behind him, a much larger translucent ghost-image of his face and upper body is layered into the background, rendered in pale gold-grey tones. The background is a warm pale gold gradient. The overall rendering is in the CGI-photoreal style consistent with FFXV's character assets.
foreground: young man in dark jacket with styled hair and glasses, composed expression
background: warm pale gold gradient with large translucent ghost-face overlay
